api_token.description: Pylon API token, sent as an OAuth-style Bearer token. Never logged.

base_url.description: Pylon API base URL. Defaults to https://api.usepylon.com.

start_date.description: RFC3339 lower bound sent as the updated_after query parameter on every request, when set. Matches legacy's optional start_date passthrough.

mode.description: Runtime mode marker; fixture is used only by legacy native connector tests.

account_id.description: Path parameter used by Pylon account_relationships streams.

call_recording_id.description: Path parameter used by Pylon call_recording streams.

contact_id.description: Path parameter used by Pylon contact streams.

custom_fields_object_type.description: Required object_type query parameter for custom_fields.

custom_field_id.description: Path parameter used by Pylon custom_field streams.

custom_object_type.description: Path parameter used by Pylon custom_objects streams.

feature_request_id.description: Path parameter used by Pylon feature_request streams.

issue_id.description: Path parameter used by Pylon issue streams.

knowledge_base_id.description: Path parameter used by Pylon knowledge_base streams.

article_id.description: Path parameter used by Pylon article streams.

collection_id.description: Path parameter used by Pylon collection streams.

macro_id.description: Path parameter used by Pylon macro streams.

milestone_id.description: Path parameter used by Pylon milestone streams.

project_id.description: Path parameter used by Pylon project streams.

survey_id.description: Path parameter used by Pylon survey streams.

tag_id.description: Path parameter used by Pylon tag streams.

task_id.description: Path parameter used by Pylon task streams.

team_id.description: Path parameter used by Pylon team streams.

ticket_form_id.description: Path parameter used by Pylon ticket_form streams.

training_data_id.description: Path parameter used by Pylon training_data_detail streams.

user_id.description: Path parameter used by Pylon user streams.

custom_object_id.description: Path parameter used by Pylon custom_object streams.
